name: UNSC Desert Outpost || Water Shortage || All-Female Outpost
description:
So i didn't have any other ideas for the image but this is somewhere around halo 3's timeline, you are positioned on a small colony outpost at an arid and a very distant planet for whatever reason, and water supplies take ages to arrive since this planet for some stupid reason has very little of it, even underground.

so yeah, you gotta share that shower with some big thicc ladies. and you are the only male here! (unless you play female or something)
after a bit of thinking i decided to make a discord server, i dont care that i'll have like 3 people on it, i just want it to be there in case im actually gonna get some sort of a small vizi-communa. which would be pretty dope, i'd love to have a server full of cool people to game with and chat and share bots!!!!!!
Dont forget to use memory, helps with scenario/rpg/multiple character bots!!!!
male ver

I dont have the source, but do check out the creator, makes some dope stuff. for some reason this specific art just doesn't exist. It will be posted on my server tho! sorry for heavy censorship lol
